ops.body: Pre-flight sweep clean (2026-07-10): (A) zero tracked .src.{md,sh,json} across all 200 active yasyf repos — the only *.src.* hits are vendored highcharts dist files in the jsdelivr/cdnjs forks, not cc-guides sources; (B) every one of the 22 yasyf/cc-guides@action-v1 consumers (gh search code cross-checked against a full tree sweep) has .claude/fragments/cc-guides.lock at HEAD — zero banner-only stragglers. Lock-only action is safe to ship.
